roles.jobTitle: Senior Product Developer / Senior Mechanical Engineer
accomplishments: Mechanical Lead for a cardiac monitoring and ultrasound integrated display system, progressing from concept through regulatory submission over approximately 2.5 years.
Managed the design and integration of more than 50 unique components, including complete tolerance stack-up analysis.
Led mechanical integration, user-interface layout and electrical-component packaging.
Designed the system to meet IP22 and applicable IEC 60601-1 requirements.
Developed components using CNC machining, sheet-metal bending, die forming and overmoulding.
Mechanical Lead for the next-generation chassis of a globally recognised contrast-injector system, progressing through system integration.
Product Lead for an AI-based machine-learning system for detecting wet conditions in inline intravenous components.
Mechanical Lead for a portable ultrasound system intended to support stillbirth prevention, including display, transducer and electrical integration.
Built and deployed a fully functional iOS application for 3D medical imaging, including UI/UX design, backend integration, Xcode generation and iOS implementation.
Contributed across 13+ projects involving mechanical engineering, software, firmware, manufacturing and medical-device development.
Developed the company’s largest database of biocompatible and high-temperature engineering polymers for medical-device applications.
Designed a Jira and Clarizen application to automate aspects of project management and tracking.
Managed and mentored junior product developers and coordinated more than two team members throughout major projects.
Delivered SolidWorks training sessions and provided daily guidance in CAD, design for manufacture, materials selection and medical-device development.
Acted as a mechanical external reviewer for other company projects.
Led and participated in more than ten internal and formal design reviews for technical accuracy and regulatory compliance.
Hosted weekly client meetings, presenting technical outcomes, risks, proposed solutions and design decisions.
Coordinated cross-functional teams across mechanical, electrical, firmware, software, manufacturing, quality and regulatory disciplines.
Designed and developed more than 200 orthopaedic surgical instruments currently used in theatre settings.
Developed the company’s first reverse shoulder arthroplasty instrument set, providing a lightweight, single-tray solution suitable for all configurations.
Designed knee-replacement instrumentation and an associated surgical tray set.
Designed a customised femoral-head retractor.
Contributed to the design and development of a canine femoral implant system.
Project Lead for a Class II constrained liner and femoral-head combination targeting a broader clinical market.
Invented a self-orienting femoral-stem broach system currently progressing through the patent process.
Designed the SignaStretch ligament-preparation jig.
Developed a product-tracking interface integrated into the Quality Management System, improving visibility and communication between departments.
Created SolidWorks macros and design-automation tools to reduce repetitive work and improve engineering output.
Supported expansion of the company’s orthopaedic implant and surgical-instrument portfolio.
Conducted internal audits across multiple devices for pre-certification and regulatory-submission readiness.
Product Lead for the OculusID handheld pupillometer.
Managed project stakeholders, development activities, timeline and budget.
Designed and developed the application’s UI/UX using React, Electron, JavaScript and TypeScript.
Developed backend functionality using Python.
Coordinated software and hardware development activities required for the handheld medical device.
Designed and executed pre-validation protocols to support regulatory readiness.
One of two engineers responsible for achieving CE marking on two medical devices, with an additional device progressing through regulatory submission.
Contributed to regulatory and certification activities involving Class II and Class III medical devices.
Designed and developed a nitinol arterial stent.
Project Lead for an implantable Class IIa tracheal stent.
Project Lead for a sinuplasty balloon-dilation system.
Contributed to five medical-device R&D projects and led two devices through final prototyping, regulatory documentation and verification and validation.
Designed and developed medical devices within an ISO 13485 quality-management framework.
Worked across concept development, CAD, prototyping, risk management, regulatory documentation, verification and validation, manufacturing transfer and production support.
Designed and manufactured the mechanical and electrical components for two three-axis precision micro-gluing machines.
Designed and manufactured a multi-chamber ultraviolet adhesive-curing station.
Sole developer of four production machines used to improve and scale medical-device manufacturing.
Designed bench-test equipment and prepared equipment and process validation plans, including DQ, IQ, OQ and PQ.
Conducted internal regulatory and quality audits.
Performed cleanroom production, stent design, electropolishing, PCB layout and machining activities.
